title: Coupon discount type catalogue
description: Every valid discount_type + the shape of its (amount, currency) tuple + validation bounds + display metadata. The valid_discount_type_amount_combo rule reads this catalogue. The CouponValidator::computeDiscount() method uses it to select the computation shape at redemption time.

types.description: Percentage discount applied to the source_amount_cents.
Fixed monetary discount deducted from source_amount_cents. Refuses when source < discount_amount (never over-discount).
N days of free subscription time added to a Membership. Discount_amount is the number of days (1..365). Only for Membership targets.
types.computation: 0 discount on source_amount_cents; extends membership.paid_through_at by discount_amount days

types.description: Waives the first period fee on a NEW membership. No discount_amount — the discount equals the source_amount_cents. Refuses when the target Membership already has paid periods.

50% off the source_amount_cents when the target is one of the applicable_plan_ids. Effectively half-price on eligible plans. Requires applicability='specific_membership_plans' with non-empty applicable_plan_ids.
types.notes: Bogo is deliberately simple in v1 — full 50% off the applicable plan. More complex bogo variants (buy N get M, buy X get Y-free) are out of scope for v1; use bulk-issued fixed_amount codes as a workaround.

types.description: Zeroes the shipping component of the invoice line. No discount_amount — computed against the target's shipping_amount_cents (which the invoice module resolves from the customer's address + tax provider).

notes: Small tier: percent + fixed_amount + free_shipping. Medium+ unlocks free_period + first_month_free + bogo via `coupon_advanced_discount_types` entitlement.
amount_min / amount_max are the observer-enforced bounds. Tenants can further restrict via per-coupon config.

clamp_max_to_source=true means the computed discount is capped at source_amount_cents (never over-discount / never produce a negative final amount). free_period is the exception — the discount is on time, not money.
requires_amount=false for first_month_free / bogo / free_shipping — the amount field on the coupon row is NULL for these types. The observer refuses non-null discount_amount for these types.
